curation_notes: Patch modifies only db/query.go (1 non-test source file). The fix parameterizes N1QL queries in buildAccessQuery, buildRoleAccessQuery, and QueryAllDocs that previously interpolated user-controlled username, startkey, and endkey values directly into query strings via strings.Replace and fmt.Sprintf. The pre-assigned class sql-injection is correct — N1QL is Couchbase's SQL-like query language and the vulnerability is direct string interpolation of user input into queries. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern.
